product_data.Features: 16-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, Apple M3 Pro chip, 18GB unified memory, 512GB SSD, 22-hour battery life, MagSafe 3 charging, Thunderbolt 4 ports

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm really impressed by the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro) you have for sale. I'm definitely interested in it and wanted to ask if there might be any flexibility on the price?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I'm glad to hear you're interested in the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro)! While I can't go below the wholesale price, I can offer you a great deal. How does $2,200 sound to you?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thanks for the offer, but $2,200 is still quite a bit higher than I can manage. I was hoping to find something closer to $1,500.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget concerns. Given the quality and features of the MacBook Pro, I can offer you a discounted price of $1,800, which is the wholesale price. Would that work for you?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate you meeting me at $1,800. That's my absolute maximum, and I was really hoping for a bit more flexibility, perhaps closer to $1,700, to make this work. Is there any wiggle room at all below $1,800?

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I'm glad we could agree on $1,800. Unfortunately, I can't go below the wholesale price on this product. However, I assure you that at $1,800, you're getting a fantastic deal for the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro) with all its premium features.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Okay, I understand you can't go lower. I'll take it for $1,800.
